parameters.content:
## APMG — Compose Email (per-lead AI drafts)

**Trigger:** the dashboard's Pipeline → Send Campaigns tab POSTs here when you click *Compose email*.

**Setup (once):**
1. Open the **Claude (Anthropic)** node and select your Anthropic credential.
2. RECOMMENDED — open the **Compose Email Webhook** node → Authentication → **Header Auth**, create a header credential with name `x-apmg-secret` and a random value, then set that same value as `N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET` in the app's env (the compose + send routes send it automatically). This webhook triggers server-side page fetches + paid Claude calls, so leaving it open lets anyone who finds the URL run them.
3. Activate the workflow, copy the **Production URL** from the Webhook node.
4. Add it on the dashboard's **Integrations** tab (or set `N8N_COMPOSE_WEBHOOK_URL` in `.env.local`) and restart the app.

**What it does per lead:**
- Uses the CSV emails when the lead already has some (max 10).
- Otherwise fetches the website + its contact page and regex-extracts emails (max 10). Internal / private-network hosts are rejected (SSRF guard) and only same-domain contact links are followed.
- Claude writes a subject + HTML body tailored to the lead's CSV `Category`, opening with at least one full paragraph, with the CTA href left as the literal `{{link}}` token — the app substitutes the tracked `/t/<lead>?c=<campaign>` URL at send time.

**Request body:** `{ campaign, leads: [{ id, name, website, category, emails }] }` (≤ 10 leads per run)
**Response:** `{ ok, results: [{ id, business, category, url, emails, email_source, best_email, subject, html }] }`
